sourceName: Union Law Ministry figure reported in Parliament / press
notes: This is an interim Supreme Court-wide pendency snapshot, not a complete official live ingestion.
The source reports Union Law Minister / Rajya Sabha figures and states that the Supreme Court had 90,694 pending cases as of 2025-12-01.
Civil/criminal split, monthly institution, monthly disposal, clearance rate, and old-case buckets were not available from this source and are intentionally omitted rather than estimated.
Replace this with official Supreme Court of India or NJDG structured data when a verified source URL is available.
